libraries.name: Decision Analysis
libraries.description: Frameworks for efficient, structured decision-making in complex and high-stakes situations. Three-lens framework: FRAME -> ANALYZE -> DECIDE.

libraries.name: AI Monetization
libraries.description: Practical guidance for generating revenue using AI systems. Products, services, infrastructure. Three-lens framework: IDENTIFY -> EVALUATE -> EXECUTE.

libraries.name: System Design
libraries.description: Design-oriented companion: blueprints, workflows, data contracts, roadmaps. Three-lens framework: FRAME -> DESIGN -> EVOLVE.

libraries.name: Demo Library
libraries.description: Minimal scaffolding reference; disabled by default.
